prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and is related to schemes operating under UK-wide regulations, which are not specific to Scotland. Therefore, it does not apply to Scotland, as energy policy and related matters may be devolved in nature.
